properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Can you take me by the hand Can you use me as I am Break me into who you want me to be When the time is finally right

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You will open up my eyes Show me everything you want me to see This life is not my own

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: To God alone be the glory To God alone be the praise Everything I say and do Let it be all for you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The glory is yours alone Yours alone Take the offering I bring You want more than what I sing Can I give you every part of me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Turn these pennies into gold Take this life I call my own Until I'm running after your heart I'm needing to let go

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We will rise and we will fall But you remain after all You're glorious and beautiful You're beautiful
